analysis.name: Hyperliquid
analysis.summary: HYPE近期因SpaceX期货上线、ETF资金流入、营收突破11.6亿美元等利好创历史新高，但短期涨幅过大，需警惕回调风险。

recommendation.invalidation: 跌破60美元或日成交量持续萎缩

catalysts: SpaceX期货上线吸引新用户和交易量
Hyperliquid ETF自推出以来流入1.72亿美元
Hyperliquid营收超11.6亿美元，基本面强劲
Hyperion CEO看好HYPE超越交易所范畴

latestNews.reason: 指出250%涨幅后进入关键阻力区，存在不确定性

latestNews.title: Hyperliquid poised to become more than an exchange and drive HYPE higher, Hyperion CEO says
latestNews.reason: CEO看好长期发展，可能吸引更多投资者

latestNews.title: HYPE rallies to new ATH at $76.70 as SpaceX futures fuel Hyperliquid activity
latestNews.reason: SpaceX期货是近期主要催化剂，推动价格创新高

latestNews.title: Hyperliquid ETFs Draw In $172M Since Launch as HYPE Hits All-Time High
latestNews.reason: ETF资金流入显示机构兴趣增加

latestNews.title: Hyperliquid’s HYPE Just Hit a New All-Time High: Experts Now Weigh $300 Target
latestNews.reason: 专家目标价乐观，但短期可能过于激进

fundamentals: Hyperliquid是L1区块链，主打永续合约和现货交易，生态包括借贷、RWA、EVM
HYPE最大供应量10亿，当前流通约2.22亿，流通市值154亿美元，FDV约663亿美元
项目营收超11.6亿美元，显示强劲的盈利能力
已推出ETF产品，吸引机构资金
marketRead: 价格接近历史高点76.7美元，成交量约9.23亿美元，流动性充足
市场情绪偏多，但短期涨幅过大，存在获利回吐压力
risks: 短期涨幅过大（250%），技术面超买，回调风险高
FDV高达663亿美元，估值较高，需持续增长支撑
加密货币市场整体波动性大，监管风险
解锁风险：总供应量约9.55亿，流通仅2.22亿，未来解锁可能带来抛压
watchlist: 能否突破并站稳76.7美元历史高点
日成交量是否维持高位
SpaceX期货交易量及用户增长数据
sourceNotes: Binance数据因地区限制无法获取，价格数据来自CoinGecko
新闻来源包括CryptoRank、The Block、crypto.news等，时效性较好
部分新闻标题可能夸大，需结合实际情况判断

profile.name: Hyperliquid
profile.description: Hyperliquid is a layer one (L1) blockchain best known for perpetual futures and spot trading. Beyond its flagship DEX trading platform, the ecosystem supports borrowing, lending, real world assets (RWAs), and a full-fledged Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), making it a leading force in decentralized finance (defi). Just as electronic trading dramatically improved markets in the 2000s, Hyperliquid offers an opportunity for a massive technical upgrade of the existing financial system through a transparent, efficient, and resilient blockchain. HYPE is the native token of the Hyperliquid blockchain, with a maximum supply of 1 billion.
